expected.notes: Work location matches between I-983 and employment letter so location_mismatch must not fire despite all context suggesting STEM OPT compliance review.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'location_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.work_location mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
